candidates.row_label: Depreciation and impairment tangible and ROU assets
candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A line above EBIT, but it is not labelled as COGS/cost of sales and does not clearly relate to the selected COGS bucket 'External project costs'. Conservative treatment is not to add it to COGS.

Explicit operating amortisation line above EBIT, but it is not labelled as COGS/cost of sales and does not clearly relate to the selected COGS bucket 'External project costs'. Conservative treatment is not to add it to COGS.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is only 'External project costs'. No separate D&A row is explicitly tied to COGS/COR, so no COGS-specific D&A should be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and impairment tangible and ROU assets
candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A line above EBIT and outside the selected XSGA component rows ('Salaries and personnel cost' and 'Other operating expenses'). Earlier mapping notes explicitly excluded D&A from XSGA components, so this separate line should be added later if using explicit operating D&A.

Explicit operating amortisation line above EBIT and outside the selected XSGA component rows. Earlier mapping notes explicitly excluded amortization from XSGA components, so this separate line should be added later if using explicit operating D&A.

variables.notes: Manually Changed. These are separate operating D&A lines at the same level as other operating expenses and were excluded from the selected XSGA component bucket. They therefore appear to require separate add-back to XSGA. Manual review is flagged because both rows are mixed D&A/impairment labels rather than pure D&A labels, and the statement does not explicitly allocate them between COGS and SG&A.
